sops.title: Updating the 2026 Deposit Sheet
sops.trigger: Every day — record yesterday's deposits from eStore, Practice Better, and GoHighLevel
sops.summary: Open the 2026 Deposit Sheet, go to the correct month tab, and confirm you are entering yesterday's date.
steps: Open 2026 Deposit Sheet → correct month tab → yesterday's date
eStore (Iris CRM): Deposits → Custom Range → Yesterday → copy Totals by Card Type → paste under eStore
Practice Better (Dr. Jaban): Billings & Payments → Paid → Yesterday → enter total ($0 if none)
GHL (Dr. Jaban): Transactions → Yesterday → Succeeded → Download → Column P AutoSum → paste total
Other companies monthly totals only using + method: Jess (PB+GHL excl $19.99), Motley (GHL only excl $19.99), Alyssa (GHL only)
Message Emma to confirm completion
sops.warning: Include $19.99 discovery calls for Dr. Jaban ONLY. Exclude for all other providers.

sops.title: End-of-Day Transaction Reconciliation
sops.trigger: At end of each business day — reconcile Stripe, Practice Better, and GHL
sops.summary: Reconcile all payment platforms at end of day: Stripe, Practice Better, and GoHighLevel. Ensures nothing is missed or double-counted.

sops.title: Recording a Recurring Payment for New Clients
sops.trigger: When setting up a new client's subscription in GHL
steps: GHL → Payments → Subscriptions → Add Subscription
Paste client email under Add Customer
Set billing start date → choose plan
Use saved card or add new card → click Schedule
Confirm subscription shows as active

sops.title: Issuing Refunds in GoHighLevel
sops.trigger: When a client requests a refund or a charge needs to be reversed
sops.warning: Under $100 = you can process. Over $100 = supervisor approval required FIRST. Always document reason in client record.

sops.title: How to Pause a Payment in GoHighLevel
sops.trigger: When a client needs to temporarily pause their subscription without cancelling
sops.notes: Pausing keeps account active — client can resume without new setup. Always confirm pause duration with client first.

sops.title: Post-Care Plan Continuity Enrollment
sops.trigger: When transitioning a client from their care plan to continuity or a la carte
sops.summary: Pricing: Jaban Momentum $499/mo (1x appt + 2x coach + chat + discounts). Mid Tier $399/mo. Jaban A La Carte $250/appt. Mid Tier A La Carte $165/appt.
steps: Monthly: GHL → Payments → Subscriptions → Add Subscription → email → date → plan → Schedule
Then PB: Book Package → Momentum → Save. Repeat for Claire (health coach)
A La Carte: PB client profile → Manage Tags → add tag: Continuity

sops.title: Momentum Call Script — Post-Care Plan Follow-Up
sops.trigger: During the 20-minute continuity phone call at end of care plan
steps: Open with empathy: check in on care plan completion
Bridge: Nicole is out, you're covering next steps
Fork question: 'High-touch ongoing support or book as needed?'
Monthly path: $499/mo, month-to-month, no long contract
A la carte path: $250/appt, self-serve booking in PB
Close: supplements via Word Health portal, can switch plans anytime

sops.title: Escalation SOP
sops.trigger: When a situation exceeds your authority or requires supervisor involvement
sops.warning: Escalate immediately for: client safety, refunds over $100, legal complaints, provider-client conflict, anything uncertain.

sops.title: Handling Suicidal Clients
sops.trigger: Use immediately if a client makes any statement about self-harm or suicidal ideation
steps: 911 = immediate danger. 988 = Crisis Lifeline 24/7
Listen without judgment — do not counsel directly
State clinic role: 'Our clinic is not equipped to handle mental health crisis support'
Provide 911 and 988 immediately
If active harm plan: keep them on call while contacting emergency services
Document everything: date, time, statements, resources provided
Notify supervisor immediately
sops.warning: Do NOT attempt counseling. Do NOT make promises about safety. Do NOT skip documentation.

sops.title: Sales Process Standard Operating Procedure
sops.trigger: Full end-to-end process after closing a sale
steps: GHL Dashboard → money sign (Payments) → Transactions → choose template
Templates: Pay in Full / Payment Plan / OAT / HTMA / Custom
Select customer → add products → Record Payment → Charge Card
PB: Bookings & Packages → Book Package → 5-month Full or Plan → schedule Initial Care Consult
Post-sale: Slim and Sarah handle automatically
sops.notes: $4k range = Dr. Bronwyn's package. $7k range = Dr. Jaban's package.

sops.title: How to Run a Sales Call (Balance the Biome)
sops.trigger: When conducting a discovery or sales call
steps: Pre-call prep: review client details and prior interactions
Warm empathetic opening — acknowledge their situation
Problem ID using biome analogy: body like a forest, imbalance causes symptoms
Present test results: inflammation test, system evaluations
3-step method: Testing → Safety → Balance
Close: 'Are you ready to take the next step toward improved health?'
